name: Geoportale Nazionale (MASE)
operator: Ministry of Environment and Energy Security (MASE)
dataType: Environmental and territorial geospatial data
description: Italy's national geoportal and INSPIRE access point for environmental and territorial data, managed by the Ministry of Environment.

name: RNDT - Repertorio Nazionale dei Dati Territoriali
dataType: Metadata catalogue for territorial data
description: National repository of territorial data metadata, serving as Italy's INSPIRE discovery service and catalogue of public geospatial datasets.

name: ISTAT Geographic Data
dataType: Administrative boundaries, census geographies
description: Official Italian administrative boundaries at municipal, provincial, and regional levels, plus census enumeration areas updated periodically.

name: ISPRA Environmental Data
operator: Istituto Superiore per la Protezione e la Ricerca Ambientale (ISPRA)
dataType: Environmental indicators, soil, water, biodiversity data
description: Italy's national environmental protection agency providing databases on soil, water quality, biodiversity, waste, and environmental indicators.

name: ISPRA Geoportale
dataType: Environmental geospatial layers, geological survey data
description: ISPRA's INSPIRE-compliant geoportal providing OGC web services for environmental cartography including geological survey and hydrological data.

name: INGV Open Data Portal
operator: Istituto Nazionale di Geofisica e Vulcanologia (INGV)
dataType: Seismic events, earthquake catalogues, volcanic data
description: Italy's seismological and volcanological open data portal providing earthquake catalogues, seismic bulletins, and volcanic monitoring data from INGV.

name: Servizio Meteorologico Aeronautica Militare
dataType: Weather observations, forecasts, climate data
description: Italy's national meteorological service operated by the Air Force, providing weather observations, forecasts, radar, satellite imagery, and climate data.

name: dati.gov.it - Italian Open Data Portal
dataType: Multi-sector open data including geospatial
description: Italy's national open data catalogue aggregating datasets from public administrations at all levels, including geospatial datasets documented in the RNDT.

name: Centro de Descargas CNIG
dataType: Topographic maps, orthoimagery, DEM, administrative boundaries
description: Spain's national mapping agency download centre providing free access to topographic maps, PNOA orthoimagery, LiDAR, DEMs, and administrative boundaries.

name: IDEE - Infraestructura de Datos Espaciales de España
dataType: SDI metadata catalogue, geospatial web services
description: Spain's national spatial data infrastructure geoportal integrating over 45,000 geographic resources from national, regional, and local administrations.

name: AEMET OpenData
dataType: Weather observations, forecasts, climatological data
description: Spain's state meteorological agency open data REST API providing weather observations, forecasts, warnings, radar, satellite, and climatological series.

name: IGME - MapasIGME Digital Cartography
operator: Instituto Geológico y Minero de España (IGME-CSIC)
dataType: Geological maps, lithology, hydrogeology, geomorphology
description: Spain's geological survey digital cartography portal providing the MAGNA 50 geological map series and hydrogeological, geomorphological, and geotechnical maps.

name: MITECO Open Data Portal
operator: Ministerio para la Transición Ecológica y el Reto Demográfico (MITECO)
dataType: Environmental data, water, biodiversity, climate, energy
description: Open data portal of Spain's Ministry for Ecological Transition providing environmental, water resources, biodiversity, and energy datasets.

name: MITECO SDI Geoportal
dataType: Environmental geospatial data, water basins, flood maps, biodiversity
description: Spatial data infrastructure of Spain's environmental ministry providing INSPIRE-compliant geospatial services for water, biodiversity, and land use data.

name: datos.gob.es - Spanish Open Data Portal
dataType: Multi-sector open data including geospatial
description: Spain's national open data portal aggregating datasets from all levels of public administration, including federated CNIG geographic data.

name: SNIG - Sistema Nacional de Informação Geográfica
dataType: National geographic information, INSPIRE metadata
description: Portugal's national geographic information infrastructure coordinated by DGT, providing INSPIRE-compliant metadata search, discovery, and OGC web services.

name: DGT Open Geographic Data
dataType: Administrative boundaries, land use/cover, orthoimagery
description: Open geographic datasets from Portugal's national mapping authority including CAOP administrative boundaries, COS land cover, and orthophoto coverage.

name: IPMA Open Data API
operator: Instituto Português do Mar e da Atmosfera (IPMA)
dataType: Weather forecasts, climate observations, sea state
description: Portuguese meteorological and oceanographic institute providing a public REST API with weather forecasts, climate observations, and sea state data.

name: LNEG GeoPortal
operator: Laboratório Nacional de Energia e Geologia (LNEG)
dataType: Geological maps, geosites, mineral resources, hydrogeology
description: Portugal's geological survey geoportal providing digital geological maps, geosite inventory, mineral resources, and hydrogeological data via OGC services.

name: SNIAmb - Sistema Nacional de Informação de Ambiente
dataType: Environmental data, water quality, biodiversity, waste
description: Portugal's national environmental information system managed by APA, providing access to interoperable environmental data on water, biodiversity, waste, and air quality.

name: SNIRH - Sistema Nacional de Informação de Recursos Hídricos
dataType: Hydrological observations, water quality, groundwater levels
description: Portugal's national water resources information system providing hydrometric, precipitation, water quality, and groundwater monitoring data from hundreds of stations.

name: dados.gov.pt - Portuguese Open Data Portal
dataType: Multi-sector open data
description: Portugal's national open data portal aggregating nearly 10,000 datasets from 159 public administration organisations across diverse sectors.

name: Hellenic Cadastre INSPIRE Geoportal
dataType: Cadastral parcels, property boundaries, land registry
description: INSPIRE-compliant geoportal of Greece's national cadastre providing cadastral parcel boundaries and land registry geospatial data.

name: geodata.gov.gr - Greek Geospatial Open Data
dataType: Open geospatial data, INSPIRE services
description: Greece's INSPIRE-compliant national open geospatial data portal providing vector and raster data, OGC web services, and a Data API since 2010.

name: HSGME Geoscientific Data Portal
operator: Hellenic Survey of Geology and Mineral Exploration (HSGME/EAGME)
dataType: Geological maps, mineral resources, landslides, groundwater
description: Greece's geological survey geoportal providing INSPIRE-compliant geoscientific data including geological formations, landslides, mines, and water quality.

name: HNMS - Hellenic National Meteorological Service
dataType: Weather observations, forecasts, climate data
description: Greece's national meteorological service providing weather forecasts, observations, marine forecasts, and free climate data for research and education.

name: data.gov.gr - Greek Open Data Portal
operator: General Secretariat of the Greek Prime Minister
dataType: Multi-sector open data
description: Greece's national open data repository with over 10,500 datasets across 17 topics from government agencies, supporting DCAT-AP standards.

name: Greece INSPIRE Geoportal
dataType: INSPIRE-compliant environmental and spatial data
description: Greece's national INSPIRE geoportal providing discovery and access to INSPIRE-compliant spatial datasets from Greek public authorities.

name: Cyprus Geospatial Information Portal (DLS)
operator: Department of Lands and Surveys (DLS), Ministry of Interior
dataType: Cadastral data, topographic maps, orthoimagery, INSPIRE data
description: Cyprus's INSPIRE-compliant national geoportal providing cadastral maps, topographic data, orthoimagery, and interactive GIS layers from the DLS.

name: DLS Portal - Cyprus Land Information System
dataType: Land registry, property data, cadastral surveys
description: Cyprus's largest electronic library of cadastral and descriptive land data enabling property searches, application tracking, and interactive map access.

name: Cyprus Department of Meteorology
operator: Department of Meteorology, Ministry of Agriculture
dataType: Weather observations, forecasts, climate data
description: Cyprus's official meteorological service providing weather forecasts, automatic weather station data from 52 stations, and historical climate records.

name: Cyprus Geological Survey Department
operator: Geological Survey Department, Ministry of Agriculture
dataType: Geological maps, hydrogeology, seismology, geotechnical data
description: Cyprus's geological survey providing digital geological maps, hydrogeological data, seismological monitoring, and geotechnical studies.

name: data.gov.cy - Cyprus National Open Data Portal
operator: Ministry of Finances, Republic of Cyprus
dataType: Multi-sector open data including geospatial
description: Cyprus's national open data portal with over 1,200 datasets from 94 organisations, achieving 94% open data maturity in 2024.

name: Malta INSPIRE Geoportal (MSDI)
dataType: Environmental geospatial data, INSPIRE datasets
description: Malta's INSPIRE-compliant spatial data infrastructure portal for sharing environmental geospatial datasets, hosted by MITA with open-source software.

name: Malta GeoHub
dataType: Multi-theme geospatial data, land use, planning zones
description: Malta's central geospatial hub fostering collaboration among government, business, academia, and citizens through open geospatial data sharing.

name: Malta Environment Platform & Services (MEPS)
dataType: Environmental spatial data, air quality, water, biodiversity
description: Malta's shared environmental information platform by ERA providing public access to environmental spatial data on air, water, biodiversity, and waste.

name: INSPIRE Malta Hub
dataType: INSPIRE datasets, land use, protected areas, transport
description: Malta's ArcGIS Hub-based INSPIRE portal for discovering, viewing, and downloading geospatial information in compliance with the EU INSPIRE Directive.

name: Malta International Airport MetOffice
dataType: Weather observations, temperature, wind, pressure, rainfall
description: Malta's meteorological office providing real-time weather observations from 9 stations across Malta and Gozo, covering wind, temperature, humidity, and rainfall.
